title: Aptitude
subtitle: Event Management & Ticketing Platform
summary: An enterprise ticketing platform designed to manage high-volume checkins, real-time analytics, and smooth payment processing.
overview: Aptitude is a ticketing and event orchestration engine designed to support thousands of concurrent check-ins. The platform leverages modern client-side caching alongside robust backend transactional queues.
problem: Legacy ticketing portals crashed under ticket release loads, resulting in duplicate order creation and inventory mismatches.
role: Lead Full Stack Architect responsible for checkout flow design, API performance, and database locking strategies.
solution: Built a system featuring atomic locks during cart reservations and structured data synchronization pathways.
features: Atomic cart reservation queues with automatic TTL release
QR Code ticket check-in pipeline with offline caching validation
Real-time event analytics dashboards featuring live occupancy tracking

technicalDecisions.reason: Provides robust database transaction tools and clean serializer logic.
Enabled fast initial render via static page generation combined with dynamic checkout hydration.

challenges: Resolving race conditions when two customers checked out the last remaining ticket simultaneously.
outcomes: Zero inventory leaks across 10+ major local events, processing over 15,000 tickets seamlessly.
